name: agt
description: A 15-role software engineering subagent team organized into six departments (Orchestration, Architecture & Design, Research & Intelligence, Delivery Engineering, Quality & Reliability, Security) with a project-manager orchestrator. Includes two shared skills — a structured agent-handoff protocol and a canonical execution-flows-and-gates reference — covering features, bug fixes, incidents, refactors, API changes, and security audits.
